narrative: NFPA 70E LOTO for breaker MCC-A bus work. Energy sources identified: 480V three-phase main, control 120V, no capacitive storage. Affected personnel notified by foreman. Equipment shut down in normal sequence using local stop, breaker opened at disconnect. Isolation verified: visible open on disconnect; lockout hasp + individual lock + tag applied by qualified electrician. Stored energy released (control caps dissipated through bleed resistor for 90 s). Zero-energy verified with rated Cat IV meter — live-dead-live test on all three phases shows 0 V to ground and phase-to-phase. Tested before re-energization. Locks removed only by applier per procedure. Energized Electrical Work Permit not required because ESWC established.
